title: The New Library Card
synopsis: A child gets a first library card and discovers a room full of quiet adventures.
sentences: Holly had waited all week to visit the town library.
When she walked in, the room felt cool, quiet, and full of possibility.
Rows of books stood on tall shelves from one wall to another.
A librarian at the desk asked Holly if she wanted her first library card.
Holly nodded so quickly that her mother laughed.
The librarian printed the card and wrote Holly's name on the back.
Then she showed Holly where the children's books were kept.
Holly chose one book about space and another about a lost dog.
She held them carefully as if they were treasure.
Before leaving, she watched another child listening to a story near the corner rug.
The library felt peaceful, but it was also full of hidden journeys.
Holly decided she would come back as often as she could.
